remember: Identify the major milestones in the evolution of human civilization from the beginning of time.
Recall the key events in the Paleolithic, Mesolithic, and Neolithic periods.
List the primary characteristics of the Stone Age and the Bronze Age.
understand: Explain the significance of the Neolithic Revolution in shaping human history.
Describe the impact of climate change on human migration and settlement during the Paleolithic period.
Discuss the importance of agriculture in the development of complex societies during the Neolithic period.
apply: Use archaeological evidence to reconstruct the lives of early humans during the Stone Age.
Analyze the role of trade and cultural exchange in the development of civilization during the Bronze Age.
Evaluate the impact of environmental factors on human habitation and migration during the Paleolithic and Mesolithic periods.
analyze: Compare and contrast the social and economic structures of early civilizations in different regions.
Examine the role of leadership and governance in the development of complex societies during the Neolithic period.
Analyze the impact of technological advancements on human history from the beginning of time to the present day.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the major milestones in the evolution of human civilization from the beginning of time.
To identify the key events in the Paleolithic, Mesolithic, and Neolithic periods.
To explain the significance of the Neolithic Revolution in shaping human history.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to describe the major characteristics of the Paleolithic, Mesolithic, and Neolithic periods.
Students will be able to explain the importance of agriculture in the development of complex societies during the Neolithic period.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of environmental factors on human habitation and migration during the Paleolithic and Mesolithic periods.
